rubricContent.textProperty: The planner routes the request to the correct sub-workflow agent (e.g., ExploreAndProcess for optimization tasks).
The planner explains why the chosen sub-workflow is appropriate for the request.

rubrics.description: Checks if routing decisions are justified.

rubricContent.textProperty: The planner does not route to unnecessary sub-workflows (e.g., does not invoke visualization for a data exploration request).
The planner provides a summary of what was accomplished by the sub-workflow.

rubrics.description: Ensures the planner communicates results back to the user.
